next_steps: Tissue biopsy of the retroperitoneal or pericardial soft-tissue mass for histopathology, IHC for IgG4, and molecular testing for BRAF V600E mutation
Endocrinologic workup for central diabetes insipidus (urine/serum osmolality, plasma ADH, pituitary MRI)
Whole-body FDG-PET/CT scan to assess total body involvement and identify optimal biopsy site
Systemic rheumatologic review including ANCA, anti-centromere, and anti-Scl-70 antibodies
Cardiac monitoring and formal evaluation for potential pericardial constriction
